eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 03:52 PM ON JAN 31, 2026 Effective until 11:52 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Maricopa County. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Phoenix Police Department is looking for Ralph Ruiz last seen on foot wearing a checkered jacket pajama pants, and brown shoes. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
